note_1_description_of_business.summary: SPV organized July 2, 2015. Securitization transaction closed Nov 13, 2015. Franchisor for US, Canada, Turkey, Qatar. Managed by ARG.

note_2_accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: Royalties recognized as earned. Initial franchise fees deferred and recognized over contract term after restaurant opens. Renewal fees recognized over contract term.
note_2_accounting_policies.income_taxes: LLC not subject to federal/state income taxes — pass-through to ARG.
note_2_accounting_policies.intangible_assets: Trademark/trade name $250M indefinite-lived, tested annually. Franchise agreements $7.4M amortized over 20 years.
note_2_accounting_policies.credit_losses: Lifetime expected loss method on receivables.

note_5_commitments_securitization.note_type: 2020 Class A-2 Senior Secured Fixed Rate

note_6_related_parties.management_fee_formula: base $10.4M + incremental tied to Retained Collections, 2% annual escalator

note_1_business.note: ARG counts include international franchised units (2,517 vs 2,286 domestic-only in Item 20)

note_2_accounting_policies.consolidation: Includes VIE — AFA Service Corporation is consolidated as ARG is the primary beneficiary
note_2_accounting_policies.goodwill: $18.9M, tested annually in Q4, no impairment 2022-2024

revenue_recognition.company_owned: Recognized upon delivery of food to customer
revenue_recognition.royalties: Recognized as earned, based on % of restaurant sales
revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Deferred and recognized over franchise term
revenue_recognition.advertising_contributions: Recognized as earned; ARG acts as principal and consolidates ad funds

note_2_accounting_policies.income_taxes: Included in Inspire consolidated returns. Pro rata method. Tax Sharing Agreement.
note_2_accounting_policies.leases: Operating and finance leases recognized. IBR used as discount rate. ROU assets $454.5M.

note_11_related_parties.classified_in: Stockholder's deficit (no intent to cash settle)
note_11_related_parties.management_fee_allocation: Direct charges from Inspire (changed from revenue-based allocation in 2023)
